name: shiploop
description: Complete dev lifecycle orchestration — SPEC → PLAN → BUILD → TEST → AUDIT → SHIP → OBSERVE → TRIAGE with human gates

commands.name: sl-status
commands.description: Show current ShipLoop state, phase, and available transitions

commands.name: sl-spec
commands.description: Capture or refine a feature spec from text, file, or observation

commands.name: sl-plan
commands.description: Generate an implementation plan from the current spec

commands.name: sl-build
commands.description: Execute the implementation plan using builder and boilerplate-gen agents

commands.name: sl-test
commands.description: Generate and run targeted unit tests for changed code (JiTTest)

commands.name: sl-audit
commands.description: Run security scan and code quality review on changed files

commands.name: sl-gate
commands.description: Pre-merge gate — present test/audit summary, await human approval

agents.name: spec-writer
agents.description: Captures and structures feature specs from loose input

agents.name: planner
agents.description: Generates step-by-step implementation plans from specs

agents.name: boilerplate-gen
agents.description: Fast scaffolding for config files, types, and directory structures

agents.name: test-generator
agents.description: Analyzes git diff and spec to generate targeted unit tests

agents.name: security-auditor
agents.description: Scans changed files for OWASP Top 10, injection, secrets, and unsafe dependencies

agents.name: quality-reviewer
agents.description: Reviews code for pattern consistency, naming, complexity, and conventions

agents.name: gate-presenter
agents.description: Formats test and audit results into a human-readable gate summary

skills.name: state-management
skills.description: State machine operations for ShipLoop phase transitions
